docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GAPPER, DOUG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELAN C. LAMBERT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN C. LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNTLEY, PAMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GAPPER, DOUG STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
